results.rendered_html:
ucchvāsin (wie eben) adj.
1〉 aufathmend, Luft einschnappend: saṃtatocchvāsin  SUŚR. 1,120,21 .
— 2〉 seufzend  MEGH. 100 .
— 3〉 aushauchend, verhauchend: ūrdhvocchvāsī  ŚAT. BR. 14,7,1,44 .
— 4〉 sich hebend, hervortretend: sicayāntena — stanamadhyocchvāsinā  VIKR. 7 . von einer Farbe  KUMĀRAS. 7,82 .

results.rendered_html:
ucchvāsin a.
1 Breathing, inhaling air.
2 Heaving, throbbing;  V. 1. 6 ;  Me. 102. 
3 Sighing.
4 Expiring, dying.
5 Vanishing, fading away;  Ku. 7. 82. 
6 Pausing, stopping.
7 Rising, coming forward.
